song.title: Just for Your Flowing
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D A G D There’s a life that’s deeper than our mind, . F#m Em A7 D D7 With experience of man, yet so divine. . G A It’s a life that knows no bounds; . F#m B7 And with glory is crowned; . Em7 G Asus A It’s of depth and height and breadth unsearchable.|| .D A G D Now this life is just the living One . F#m Em A7 D D7 Manifested in the person of the Son. . G A As the Spirit, He flows; . F#m B7 In our spirit He grows, . Em7 G Asus A Growing up to be the church that He desires.
[C] . D O Lord we’re just for Your flowing; . G How we need a deeper knowing! . D Life is why we’re here . Em A D D7 And why You’ve come in us. . G A Turn us, Lord, turn us now, . D G Turn us deeply - life is how . D You will get the church, . Em A D The home You’re longing for. --- [V2] .D A G D In the church, we all can apprehend . F#m Em A7 D D7 All the riches of this life that is within. . G A Not just shallowness with strife, . F#m B7 But a deep and peaceful life . Em7 G Asus A Is just waiting to flow out, a living spring.|| .D A G D With the saints it’s easy to be bold . F#m Em A7 D D7 To pursue this life, to gain it, to lay hold. . G A All the other things we find, . F#m B7 Must be quickly left behind, . Em7 G Asus A So that only life remains for us to see.
[V3] .D A G D Deeper, Lord, our turn must be to You; . F#m Em A7 D D7 We would move by life in everything we do: . G A All our concepts refute, . F#m B7 For Your life be absolute; . Em7 G Asus A Grant us grace to turn much deeper day by day.|| .D A G D When we touch our spirit-such a thrill! . F#m Em A7 D D7 This is far beyond emotion, mind, and will- . G A It’s within our hidden part- . F#m B7 Come make home in all our heart; . Em7 G Asus A Let Your presence flow as rivers deep within.
